positive: A cosmic forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and stylized, monolithic ancient trees. The composition should be centered, with a dramatic, stylized silhouette of the trees against a deep indigo, starlit sky filled with nebula clouds and small constellations. Foreground elements include stylized, luminous mushrooms and delicate, flowing energy streams. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic mixed with vaporwave colors (teal, deep violet, electric blue, pops of magenta). Clean line art, vector quality, suitable for apparel printing. Minimal detail in the sky to maintain print clarity.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, artifacts, noise, low quality, messy, dirty, abstract, real photography, deep shadows, bad anatomy
